rulings.Case Title: HUONG (AMY) THAI-SILVA VS. MINH THAI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motin And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Number 9.2 And 15.1; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And His Attorney, Tanner Brink, In The Amount Of $1,067
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 22, 2018, Line 1. PLAINTIFFS HUONG (AMY) THAI-SILVA, VINH THAI, MUOI QUACH'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Number 9.2 And 15.1; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And His Attorney, Tanner Brink, In The Amount Of $1,067. GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted Re (1) Form Interrogatory 9.2 for Defendant to provide a supplemental verification stating that all responsive documents have been produced and identify the documents by Bates number; (2) Form Interrogatory 15.1 for Defendant to provide supplemental verified responses reasonably directed to each affirmative defenses and each denial of material allegations. Request for sanctions is denied. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JASON TRAVIS VS. HARRIETT M WILSON
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 22, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANTS HARRIETT WILSON, THE HARRIETT M. WILSON TRUST'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege extreme and outrageous conduct. Allegations in paragraphs 13, 14 and 15 are not sufficient. Plaintiff alleges that Defendant was notified orally starting April 2, 2016 (via a series of 2-4 minute connections, including two in the middle of the night at 12:18 a.m. and 12:22 a.m.) of 10 defective conditions (a)-(j); on August 18, 2018 water intrusion was cited by the DBI; on August 31, 2018 written notice of the conditions was made by Plaintiff. Having not been satisfied with Defendant's response to the oral notifications, DBI citation, and written notification, Plaintiffs vacated "in August 2016." These allegations are not sufficient to show outrageous conduct. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JASON TRAVIS VS. HARRIETT M WILSON
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 22, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANTS HARRIETT WILSON, THE HARRIETT M. WILSON TRUST'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support reckless disregard for Plaintiff's health and rights. =(501/CFH)
